steps.t: Culang is at Tinnudir, an island off the east shore of Lake Evendim, west of the North Downs. Glorfindel has asked you to seek out his old battle-comp…
Erchiel may be found in a glade on the north-west shore of Lake Evendim, by a stream that empties into the lake. Culang received you warmly but confes…
